dresscode.a: Traditional Indian attire is preferred and encouraged. For ceremonies — sarees, lehengas, sherwanis and kurtas are perfect. For the reception, feel free to wear semi-formal or formal Indian wear.

kids.a: Absolutely! Children are a cherished part of Indian wedding celebrations. We welcome little ones with open arms.

parking.a: Yes, complimentary parking is available at the main venue. Please coordinate with family members for directions on the day.

photos.a: Yes, please do! We encourage everyone to capture the memories. We do ask that during the Pheras, you remain seated and allow our photographer to work.

gifts.a: Your blessings and presence are the greatest gifts. If you wish to give, cash gifts are greatly appreciated.

rsvp.a: Please RSVP by 1st November 2026 so we can ensure the best experience for all our guests.

food.a: Yes! All ceremonies will have a full vegetarian menu. Non-vegetarian options will also be available at the reception.
